name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Database Access Denied
notes: This rule identifies Database events that are considered denied access.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Database Access Denied on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication to Disabled Account, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication to Expired Account
when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Database
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Database Access Denied on events which are detected by the undefined system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication to Disabled Account, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication to Expired Account
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Database
